top_findings.title: README.md is missing
top_findings.evidence: No README.md file found in run_dir root
top_findings.suggestion: Add README.md with setup, build, and run instructions

top_findings.title: POST /books body parsing fails
top_findings.evidence: test/book_api/core_test.clj:71 — create-and-get-book-test expects non-nil body but gets nil from CREATE response
top_findings.suggestion: Investigate response serialization with muuntaja middleware; body should be JSON-serialized map with ID

top_findings.title: PUT /books/:id returns 404 instead of 200
top_findings.evidence: test/book_api/core_test.clj:117 — update-book-test expects 200 but gets 404 (book not found)
top_findings.suggestion: Verify ID extraction from creation response and database persistence in tests

top_findings.title: DELETE /books/:id returns 404 instead of 204
top_findings.suggestion: Root cause same as PUT test failures — created book ID not available for subsequent operations

top_findings.title: PUT and DELETE endpoints implemented but tests fail
top_findings.evidence: handlers.clj defines update-book-handler (line 46) and delete-book-handler (line 63), but integration tests cannot verify functionality due to body parsing issues
top_findings.suggestion: Fix response serialization so tests can retrieve created book IDs and verify PUT/DELETE operations
